code:
// 교육용 빅뱅 시뮬레이션 - 중앙 핵과 주변 입자들의 결합 과정
import*as THREE from"three";/**
 * 쿼크-글루온 플라즈마 단계 (10^-12초)
 * 중앙에서 뜨거운 쿼크-글루온 플라즈마가 형성되고, 주변에서 입자들이 모여든다
 */export function createQuarkGluonPlasma(){let numParticles=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:500000;const group=new THREE.Group();// 중앙 쿼크-글루온 플라즈마 (핵처럼 표현)
const coreGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numCoreParticles=50000;const corePositions=new Float32Array(numCoreParticles*3);const coreColors=new Float32Array(numCoreParticles*3);// 중앙 코어에 쿼크-글루온 입자들 배치
for(let i=0;i<numCoreParticles;i++){const r=Math.random()*100;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 극도로 뜨거운 상태: 흰색/밝은 색
const type=Math.random();if(type<0.5){coreColors[i*3]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+1]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}else{coreColors[i*3]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+1]=0.8;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}}coreGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePositions,3));coreGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreColors,3));const coreMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.5,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeometry,coreMaterial);group.add(corePoints);// 주변에서 모여드는 입자들 (바깥쪽)
const surroundingGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numSurrounding=numParticles-numCoreParticles;const surroundingPositions=new Float32Array(numSurrounding*3);const surroundingColors=new Float32Array(numSurrounding*3);const velocities=new Float32Array(numSurrounding*3);for(let i=0;i<numSurrounding;i++){// 중앙을 향해 모여드는 입자들
const r=300+Math.random()*700;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;surroundingPositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);surroundingPositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);surroundingPositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 중앙을 향한 속도
const centerVec=new THREE.Vector3(-surroundingPositions[i*3],-surroundingPositions[i*3+1],-surroundingPositions[i*3+2]).normalize();velocities[i*3]=centerVec.x*8;velocities[i*3+1]=centerVec.y*8;velocities[i*3+2]=centerVec.z*8;// 쿼크 색상
const type=Math.random();if(type<0.3){surroundingColors[i*3]=1.0;surroundingColors[i*3+1]=0.2;surroundingColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}else if(type<0.6){surroundingColors[i*3]=0.2;surroundingColors[i*3+1]=1.0;surroundingColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}else if(type<0.85){surroundingColors[i*3]=0.2;surroundingColors[i*3+1]=0.2;surroundingColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}else{surroundingColors[i*3]=1.0;surroundingColors[i*3+1]=1.0;surroundingColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}}surroundingGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(surroundingPositions,3));surroundingGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(surroundingColors,3));const surroundingMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true});const surroundingPoints=new THREE.Points(surroundingGeometry,surroundingMaterial);surroundingPoints.userData.velocities=velocities;surroundingPoints.userData.positions=surroundingPositions;group.add(surroundingPoints);return{group,corePositions,surroundingPositions,velocities};}/**
 * 쿼크 결합 단계 (10^-6초)
 * 중앙에 형성된 하드론, 주변에서 쿼크들이 모여들어 결합된다
 */export function createQuarkCombination(stageProgress){const group=new THREE.Group();// 중앙에 형성된 하드론 (양성자/중성자) - 핵처럼
const hadronCoreGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numHadrons=100000;const hadronPositions=new Float32Array(numHadrons*3);const hadronColors=new Float32Array(numHadrons*3);for(let i=0;i<numHadrons;i++){const r=80*stageProgress;// 진행에 따라 핵이 커짐
const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;hadronPositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);hadronPositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);hadronPositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);const isProton=Math.random()>0.5;if(isProton){hadronColors[i*3]=1.0;hadronColors[i*3+1]=0.2;hadronColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}else{hadronColors[i*3]=0.2;hadronColors[i*3+1]=0.2;hadronColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}}hadronCoreGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(hadronPositions,3));hadronCoreGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(hadronColors,3));const hadronMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:3+stageProgress*2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.5+stageProgress*0.5});const hadronPoints=new THREE.Points(hadronCoreGeometry,hadronMaterial);group.add(hadronPoints);// 주변에서 모여드는 쿼크들
const quarkGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numQuarks=200000;const quarkPositions=new Float32Array(numQuarks*3);const quarkColors=new Float32Array(numQuarks*3);for(let i=0;i<numQuarks;i++){// 초반: 먼 곳에서, 진행됨: 가까워짐
const maxDistance=600*(1-stageProgress)+150*stageProgress;const r=maxDistance*(0.3+Math.random()*0.7);const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;quarkPositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);quarkPositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);quarkPositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 쿼크 색상
const type=i%3;if(type===0){quarkColors[i*3]=1.0;quarkColors[i*3+1]=0.1+stageProgress*0.3;quarkColors[i*3+2]=0.1+stageProgress*0.3;}else if(type===1){quarkColors[i*3]=0.1+stageProgress*0.3;quarkColors[i*3+1]=1.0;quarkColors[i*3+2]=0.1+stageProgress*0.3;}else{quarkColors[i*3]=0.1+stageProgress*0.3;quarkColors[i*3+1]=0.1+stageProgress*0.3;quarkColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}}quarkGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(quarkPositions,3));quarkGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(quarkColors,3));const quarkMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.5+stageProgress*1,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:1-stageProgress*0.3});const quarkPoints=new THREE.Points(quarkGeometry,quarkMaterial);group.add(quarkPoints);return group;}/**
 * 핵융합 단계 (1-3분)
 * 중앙에 형성된 가벼운 원자핵(He, Li, Be), 주변에서 양성자/중성자가 모여든다
 */export function createNucleosynthesis(stageProgress){const group=new THREE.Group();// 중앙에 형성된 핵들
const nucleiCoreGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numNuclei=150000;const nucleiPositions=new Float32Array(numNuclei*3);const nucleiColors=new Float32Array(numNuclei*3);for(let i=0;i<numNuclei;i++){// 진행에 따라 더 큰 핵 형성
const r=120*stageProgress;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;nucleiPositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);nucleiPositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);nucleiPositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 핵의 종류
const nucleusType=i%3;if(nucleusType===0){// 헬륨-4: 시안색
nucleiColors[i*3]=0.2;nucleiColors[i*3+1]=0.8+stageProgress*0.2;nucleiColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}else if(nucleusType===1){// 리튬: 초록색
nucleiColors[i*3]=0.2+stageProgress*0.3;nucleiColors[i*3+1]=1.0;nucleiColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}else{// 베릴륨: 노란색
nucleiColors[i*3]=1.0;nucleiColors[i*3+1]=1.0;nucleiColors[i*3+2]=0.2;}}nucleiCoreGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(nucleiPositions,3));nucleiCoreGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(nucleiColors,3));const nucleiMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:4+stageProgress*2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.5+stageProgress*0.5});const nucleiPoints=new THREE.Points(nucleiCoreGeometry,nucleiMaterial);group.add(nucleiPoints);// 주변에서 모여드는 양성자/중성자
const pnGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numPN=200000;const pnPositions=new Float32Array(numPN*3);const pnColors=new Float32Array(numPN*3);for(let i=0;i<numPN;i++){// 주변에서 중앙으로 모여드는 중
const maxDistance=700*(1-stageProgress)+200*stageProgress;const r=maxDistance*(0.3+Math.random()*0.7);const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;pnPositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);pnPositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);pnPositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 양성자 vs 중성자
if(Math.random()>0.5){pnColors[i*3]=1.0;pnColors[i*3+1]=0.1;pnColors[i*3+2]=0.1;}else{pnColors[i*3]=0.1;pnColors[i*3+1]=0.1;pnColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}}pnGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(pnPositions,3));pnGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(pnColors,3));const pnMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:2.5,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:1-stageProgress*0.4});const pnPoints=new THREE.Points(pnGeometry,pnMaterial);group.add(pnPoints);return group;}/**
 * 원자 형성 단계 (38만년)
 * 중앙에 핵, 주변에 전자들이 궤도를 형성하면서 중성 원자 완성
 */export function createAtomFormation(stageProgress){const group=new THREE.Group();// 중앙 핵들 (많은 수의 원자 핵)
const nucleusGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numAtomNuclei=100000;const nucleusPositions=new Float32Array(numAtomNuclei*3);const nucleusColors=new Float32Array(numAtomNuclei*3);// 핵들의 위치 저장 (전자 궤도 계산용)
const nucleusCenters=[];for(let i=0;i<numAtomNuclei;i++){// 중앙에 분포
const r=150*stageProgress;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;const nx=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);const ny=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);const nz=r*Math.cos(phi);nucleusPositions[i*3]=nx;nucleusPositions[i*3+1]=ny;nucleusPositions[i*3+2]=nz;nucleusCenters.push({x:nx,y:ny,z:nz});// 핵: 노란색
nucleusColors[i*3]=1.0;nucleusColors[i*3+1]=0.8;nucleusColors[i*3+2]=0.1;}nucleusGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(nucleusPositions,3));nucleusGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(nucleusColors,3));const nucleusMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:5+stageProgress*2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true});const nucleusPoints=new THREE.Points(nucleusGeometry,nucleusMaterial);group.add(nucleusPoints);// 전자 구름 - 핵 주변을 도는 전자들
const electronGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numElectrons=150000;const electronPositions=new Float32Array(numElectrons*3);const electronColors=new Float32Array(numElectrons*3);let eIdx=0;for(let i=0;i<numAtomNuclei&&eIdx<numElectrons;i++){const center=nucleusCenters[i];// 이 원자의 전자 개수 (수소 1개, 헬륨 2개)
const numE=Math.random()>0.3?2:1;for(let e=0;e<numE&&eIdx<numElectrons;e++){// 전자 궤도
const orbitRadius=80+(numE===2?50:0);// 궤도 상의 각도
const angle=e/numE*Math.PI*2+Math.random()*0.3;// 3D 궤도 (Bohr 모델)
const orbitalAngle=Math.acos(Math.random()*2-1);// 시간에 따라 전자 위치 진동 (orbiting effect)
const time=Date.now()*0.001;const phaseShift=time*(e+1)*0.5;const finalRadius=orbitRadius*stageProgress;electronPositions[eIdx*3]=center.x+Math.sin(orbitalAngle)*Math.cos(angle+phaseShift)*finalRadius;electronPositions[eIdx*3+1]=center.y+Math.sin(orbitalAngle)*Math.sin(angle+phaseShift)*finalRadius;electronPositions[eIdx*3+2]=center.z+Math.cos(orbitalAngle)*finalRadius;// 전자: 청록색
electronColors[eIdx*3]=0.2+stageProgress*0.4;electronColors[eIdx*3+1]=0.9+stageProgress*0.1;electronColors[eIdx*3+2]=1.0;eIdx++;}}electronGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(electronPositions.slice(0,eIdx*3),3));electronGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(electronColors.slice(0,eIdx*3),3));const electronMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:2+stageProgress*1.5,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.3+stageProgress*0.5});const electronPoints=new THREE.Points(electronGeometry,electronMaterial);group.add(electronPoints);return group;}/**
 * 빅뱅 교육용 단계 정보
 */export const educationalBigBangStages=[{id:0,name:"쿼크-글루온 플라즈마",timeRange:"10⁻¹² 초 (1 피코초)",koreanTime:"우주 1조분의 1초",description:"우주가 극도로 뜨거워 쿼크와 글루온이 자유롭게 움직이고 있습니다. 이들은 아직 결합되지 않은 상태입니다.",color:0xff6b6b,duration:2000},{id:1,name:"쿼크 결합 → 양성자/중성자",timeRange:"10⁻⁶ 초 (1 마이크로초)",koreanTime:"우주 100만분의 1초",description:"온도가 낮아지면서 쿼크 3개가 결합하여 양성자와 중성자가 형성됩니다. 강한 핵력에 의해 결합됩니다.",color:0x4ecdc4,duration:2500},{id:2,name:"핵융합 → 원자핵 형성",timeRange:"1-3 분",koreanTime:"우주 처음 3분",description:"양성자와 중성자가 결합하여 헬륨-4, 리튬 등 가벼운 원소의 핵이 형성됩니다. 이를 빅뱅 핵합성이라고 합니다.",color:0x95e77d,duration:2500},{id:3,name:"원자 형성",timeRange:"38만 년",koreanTime:"우주 38만 년",description:"우주가 충분히 식으면서 전자가 핵 주위를 돌기 시작합니다. 중성 원자(수소, 헬륨)가 형성되고 우주가 투명해집니다.",color:0xb0a0ff,duration:3000}];export function getEducationalStageInfo(stageId){return educationalBigBangStages[stageId];}export function getTotalEducationalBigBangDuration(){return educationalBigBangStages.reduce((sum,stage)=>sum+stage.duration,0);}
